---
title: "Problem Sets"
subtitle: "Problems sets are your opportunity to work on the skills discussed in class."
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="60%"}

### Problem Set Due Dates

 - **Problem Set #1:** July 10th
 - **Problem Set #2:** July 14th
 - **Problem Set #3:** July 17th
 - **Problem Set #4:** July 21st
   

Problem sets are completed individually, but you can work with each other as you complete them. Each includes a data file and a starter R script. Download both, complete your work in RStudio, and submit your rendered `.html` Quarto file by **11:59pm** on the due date.

Please submit all files [HERE](https://niuits-my.sharepoint.com/:f:/g/personal/a1837136_mail_niu_edu/IgAyO02TtbQ_SZ1nIsckE0MSAfq8zKULBddf7N0KzuYouLk). Label your file with pset#\_name (ie pset1_colin.html)


# Problem Set #1

<a href="ClassCode/ProblemSet1.qmd" download>Problem Set 1</a> 

[Data](problemsets/development.Rdata)    

[Codebook](problemsets/development_codebook.csv)


# Problem Set #2

<a href="problemsets/ProblemSet2.Rmd" download>Problem Set 2</a> 




:::

::: {.column width="40%"}

![](images/rmug.jpg)

:::

::::
